---
id: execute-item
title: "Execute an instruction item"
description: "Links an item to a deal and marks it EXECUTED. Updates parent instruction status."
sidebar_label: "Execute an instruction item"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Execute an instruction item"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/instructions/{instructionId}/items/{itemId}/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Links an item to a deal and marks it EXECUTED. Updates parent instruction status.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
